title: Beat It
why_this_song: Pure imperative drill — 'beat it', 'don't be afraid', 'show them how funky strong is your fight'. A2 students get saturated with commands.
grammar_callouts: 'show them how X is your Y' — inverted construction

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:
exercises.excerpt_after: see your face, you better disappear"

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "funky" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "funky" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fight" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fight" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: "Don't wanna see your face, you better disappear"
Then they'll tell you it's fair
Beat it (beat it), beat it (beat it)

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: So beat it, just beat it
Showin' how funky and strong is your fight
No one wants to be defeated (no one)

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Beat It" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Beat It"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Michael Jackson one question about "Beat It", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Michael Jackson sobre "Beat It", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Beat It" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Beat It" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Every line of the chorus is a command. Drill imperatives until students can hear them instinctively.

lines: It doesn't matter who's wrong or right
